import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('=== 구조 검증 ==='\)
print\(f'agents: {len\(d.get\(\\"agents\\",[]\)\)}'\)
print\(f'settings present: {\\"settings\\" in d}'\)
print\(f'activities present: {\\"activities\\" in d}'\)
print\(f'tasks present: {\\"tasks\\" in d}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 에이전트 hierarchy 검증 ==='\)
for a in d.get\('agents', []\):
    h = a.get\('hierarchy', None\)
    print\(f'  {a[\\"name\\"]:10s} role={a[\\"role\\"]:22s} hierarchy={h}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 리더의 subordinates 검증 ==='\)
leader = [a for a in d['agents'] if a.get\('hierarchy',{}\).get\('role'\) == 'leader']
if leader:
    subs = leader[0].get\('hierarchy', {}\).get\('subordinates', []\)
    names = []
    for sid in subs:
        match = [a for a in d['agents'] if a['id'] == sid]
        names.append\(match[0]['name'] if match else sid\)
    print\(f'  리더: {leader[0][\\"name\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  부하: {names}'\)
else:
    print\('  리더 없음!'\)
" 2>&1)
